zh.lifeSummary: 當Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver於大約1325年出生在俄羅斯Псковская областьПсков時，她的父親Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver25歲，母親Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia30歲。她於大約1340年與Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk在白俄羅斯Мінская вобласцьМінск結婚。她去世於1399年3月17日在蘇聯白俄羅斯Віцебская акругаВіцебскі раёнВіцебск享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver于大约1325年出生在俄罗斯Псковская областьПсков时，她的父亲Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver25岁，母亲Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia30岁。她于大约1340年与Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk在白俄罗斯Мінская вобласцьМінск结婚。她去世于1399年3月17日在苏联白俄罗斯Віцебская акругаВіцебскі раёнВіцебск享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Tver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English tewer(e) ‘tawer’, an agent noun derived from teuen ‘to taw’ (Old English tēwian), denoting someone who prepared animal skins or hides for use by dressing, curing, or treating them. Compare Tower .

variants.name: Tower
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, usually a defensive fortification or watchtower, from Middle English, Old French tūr (from Latin turris).

English: occupational name for someone who dressed white leather, cured with alum rather than tanned with bark, from an agent derivative of Middle English taw(en) (Old English tawian ‘to prepare, make ready’).

nameMeanings.name: Uliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver was born about 1325, in Pskov, Pskov Oblast, Russia, her father, Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver, was 25 and her mother, Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, was 30. She married Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk about 1340, in Minsk, Minsk, Belarus. She died on 17 March 1399, in Vitebsk, Vitebsk Raion, Vitebsk Okrug, Belarus, Soviet Union, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver est née environ 1325, à Pskov, Pskovskaya Oblastʹ, Russie, son père, Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk environ 1340, à Minsk, Minsko sritis, Biélorussie. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1399, à Vitsyebsk, Vitsyebski Rayon, Vitsyebskaya akruha, Biélorussie, Union soviétique, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver um 1325 in Pskov, Pskovskaya Oblastʹ, Russland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver 25 und ihre Mutter Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia 30. Sie hat um 1340 in Minsk, Minsko sritis, Belarus Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk geheiratet. Sie starb am 17. März 1399 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Vitsyebsk, Vitsyebski Rayon, Vitsyebskaya akruha, Weißrussland, Sowjetunion.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver è nata il circa 1325 nel Pskov, Pskovskaya Oblastʹ, Russia, sua padre, Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk circa 1340, nel Minsk, Minsko sritis, Bielorussia. Morì il 17 marzo 1399, nel Vitsyebsk, Vitsyebski Rayon, Vitsyebskaya akruha, Bielorussia, Sowjetunion, all'età di 75 anni.

Michailowitsch Von Tverは25歳，母Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galiciaは30歳であった。約1340年にベラルーシМінская вобласцьМінскでSimeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutskと結婚した。彼女は1399年3月17日にソビエト連邦ベラルーシВіцебская акругаВіцебскі раёнВіцебскで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver(이)가 대략 1325년 러시아 Псковская область Псков에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 벨라루스 Мінская вобласць Мінск에서 Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1399년 3월 17일 소련 벨라루스 Віцебская акруга Віцебскі раён Віцебск에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Pskov, Pskovskaya Oblastʹ, Rússia, seu pai, Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk aproximadamente 1340, em Minsk, Minsko sritis, Belarus. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1399, em Vitsyebsk, Vitsyebski Rayon, Vitsyebskaya akruha, Belarus, Sowjetunion, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver родилась около 1325 г. в местности Псков, Псковская область, Россия, её отцу по имени Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk около 1340 г. в местности Минск, Минская область, Беларусь. Она умерла 17 марта 1399 г. в местности Витебск, Витебский район, Витебский округ, Беларусь, Советский Союз в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Uliana Martha Aleksandrovna of Tver nació aproximadamente 1325, en Pskov, Pskovskaya Oblastʹ, Rusia, su papá, Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Simeon Mikhailovich Prince Of Drutsk aproximadamente 1340, en Minsk, Minsko sritis, Bielorrusia. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1399, en Vitsyebsk, Vitsyebski Rayon, Vitsyebskaya akruha, Belarús, Unión Soviética, a la edad de 75 años.
